    G

    getAllExpenses() - Method in class persistance.Datapersistance
    Retrieves all expenses from the database.

    Retrieves all expenses from the database.

    Returns the expense amount.

    Returns the budget cycle identifier.

    Returns the expense category.

    Calculates the percentage of total expenses for each category.
    getCategoryTotals() - Method in class Logic.DashboardController
    Retrieves the total expenses grouped by category.

    Retrieves the currently active budget cycle.
    getCurrentCycle() - Method in interface persistance.IPersistence
    Retrieves the currently active budget cycle.
    getDailyLimit() - Method in class Logic.BudgetController
    Retrieves the current safe daily spending limit.

    Returns the date of the expense.
    getDisplayName() - Method in enum class models.category
    Returns the display name of the category.
    getEndDate() - Method in class models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the end date of the cycle.
    getExpenseID() - Method in class models.expense
    Returns the expense id.
    getId() - Method in enum class models.category
    Returns the category id.
    getName() - Method in class models.user
    Returns the user name.
    getRemainingBalance() - Method in class Logic.BudgetController
    Retrieves the remaining balance for the current budget cycle.
    getRemainingBalance() - Method in class Logic.DashboardController
    Retrieves the remaining balance available in the current budget cycle.
    getRemainingBalance() - Method in class models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the remaining balance.
    getRemainingBalance() - Method in class persistance.Datapersistance
    Calculates remaining budget balance.
    getRemainingBalance() - Method in interface persistance.IPersistence
    Calculates the remaining budget balance.
    getRemainingDays() - Method in class Logic.DashboardController
    Retrieves the number of remaining days in the current budget cycle.
    getRemainingDays() - Method in class persistance.Datapersistance
    Calculates remaining days in the active budget cycle.
    getRemainingDays() - Method in interface persistance.IPersistence
    Calculates the number of remaining days in the current budget cycle.
    getSafeDailyLimit() - Method in class Logic.DashboardController
    Retrieves the safe daily spending limit for the user.
    getSafeDailyLimit() - Method in class persistance.Datapersistance
    Calculates safe daily spending limit.
    getSafeDailyLimit() - Method in interface persistance.IPersistence
    Calculates the safe daily spending limit based on remaining balance and days.
    getStartDate() - Method in class models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the start date of the cycle.
    getTotalAllowance() - Method in class models.BudgetCycle
    Returns the total allowance of the cycle.

    Calculates total expenses across all records.

    Calculates the total amount of all expenses.

    Retrieves total expenses grouped by category.

    Retrieves total expenses grouped by category.

    Retrieves a user by their ID.
